Frequently Asked Questions

Navigate to Store Settings in the sidebar to update your store name, description, logo, and contact information. Changes take effect immediately after saving.
Go to the Products section and click "Add Product". Fill in the title, description, price, and upload images. You can edit or remove products at any time from the same page.
Payouts are processed on a weekly basis every Friday. You can view your earnings and payout history in the Earnings section. Minimum payout threshold is $50.
Return requests appear in your Orders dashboard. You can approve or dispute a return within 7 days. Approved refunds are deducted from your next payout. For complex cases, submit a support ticket.
Commission rates are set by the platform and are not adjustable per vendor. However, you have full control over your product pricing. Contact support if you believe your commission rate needs review.
Account suspensions are rare and typically due to policy violations. Check your email for the suspension notice with details. You can appeal by submitting a support ticket with subject "Account Suspension Appeal" and include any relevant context.

Documentation

Browse our vendor guides for step-by-step tutorials.

Community Forum

Connect with other vendors and share best practices.

Quick Start

New to ForgeStore? Get up and running in minutes.

Send Us a Message

Please include as much detail as possible so we can help you faster.

Contact Info

Email
support@forgestore.com
Response Time
Within 24 hours on business days
Hours
Mon-Fri, 9AM-6PM EST

Emergency?

For urgent issues like account security or payment discrepancies, select "Account Issue" or "Payment Issue" as the category and mark your message with high priority.

Priority support available
